top_questions.text: Watch the underground threads again. Tomorrow: another nature signal. Is this closer to a network, a warning system, or something stranger?

Watch the silent wings again. Tomorrow: another animal signal. Is this adaptation, instinct, or intelligence?
Watch the snow hearing again. Tomorrow: another animal signal. What part of this feels most impossible?
